hero.title: Full Stack Developer | Seeking Ausbildung Fachinformatiker Anwendungsentwicklung
hero.tagline: I build fast, clean, real-world web applications

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm Ahmed Ben Henda, a Full Stack Developer from Tunisia with 2+ years of hands-on experience building modern web applications. I specialize in React, TypeScript, and Node.js, and I'm passionate about writing clean, maintainable code that solves real problems. I'm currently seeking an Ausbildung as Fachinformatiker für Anwendungsentwicklung starting in 2027.
about.whyGermany: I chose Germany because of its world-class dual education system — the Ausbildung model combines structured theory with real workplace experience, which I believe is the best way to grow as a professional developer. Germany's IT sector is leading Europe, and I want to be part of it. My Tunisian Abitur has been officially recognized as equivalent to the German Hochschulreife by the Bayerisches Landesamt für Schule.
